name: SID History Injection
notes: This rule detects SID (security identifier) history injection activities.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000934) Success Audit: SID History was added to an account, (5000935) Success Audit: An attempt to add SID History to an account failed
TD_list: APPLY SID History Injection on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000934) Success Audit: SID History was added to an account, (5000935) Success Audit: An attempt to add SID History to an account failed
RED_list: Event description: Detects SID history injection activities.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using ProcessName (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
